'''鈭歳-zh-f-n''' ('''karazhfenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:molarise|molarise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-zh-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:molarise|molarise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歳-zh-f-n
|-
! Lemma
| karazhfenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirazhfenoko|thirazhfenoko]] || [[word:jirazhfenoko|jirazhfenoko]] || [[word:shirazhfenoko|shirazhfenoko]] || [[word:kirazhfenoko|kirazhfenoko]]
